imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimal flat logo mark with a computer + graduation cap motif, warm colors (shikho-logo.dim_512x512.png)
- Friendly isometric illustration of a student learning on a laptop with simple UI elements, warm palette (shikho-hero.dim_1600x900.png)

existing_features.title: Create the app shell with a coherent visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and component styles) applied consistently across all pages for the “Shikho Computer Class” brand.
Implement a public landing page for “Shikho Computer Class” that introduces the app and provides clear calls-to-action to browse courses and sign in.
Add Internet Identity sign-in/out UI and authenticated app state so users can access enrolled courses and track progress.
Build a “Browse Courses” experience: a course list page with search/filter and a course detail page showing syllabus (lesson list) and an enroll/unenroll action (if supported).
Build a lesson viewer page that displays lesson content and allows the signed-in user to mark lessons as completed; show per-course progress.
Add a “My Learning” dashboard for signed-in users showing enrolled courses and progress, with quick navigation back to the next incomplete lesson.
Add static image assets generated for the app to frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (logo and a landing illustration).

new_feature_requests.summary: Create the Shikho Computer Class app (computer class/learning app).
Implement backend data models and APIs to support: course catalog, lesson content, enrollments per user, and lesson completion/progress per user.
Seed the app with a small default course catalog (at least 2 courses, each with at least 5 lessons) suitable for beginner computer learning, with all user-facing text in English.
